headline: Johnson & Johnson Oncology And Immunology Advances Test Valuation Story
summary: European Medicines Agency approved Johnson & Johnson’s Darzalex for self-administration across ten oncology indications, making it the first oncology injectable in Europe cleared for at home use. US FDA approved ICOTYDE, an oral IL-23 receptor antagonist, for adults with moderate to severe plaque psoriasis. Johnson & Johnson entered a clinical supply agreement with GI Innovation for a phase 1b prostate cancer trial. These recent product approvals and R&D collaborations expand NYSE:JNJ’s...
